issues.detail: The skill does not handle error scenarios or edge cases such as missing Hotjar script or undefined window.hj.
The skill assumes a web environment and Next.js, limiting its applicability to other platforms.

scenarios.name: Fix missing heatmap data on client-side routed pages in a Next.js App Router SPA
scenarios.rationale: Treatment called window.hj('stateChange', pathname) inside a useEffect keyed on usePathname() exactly as documented; baseline reinstalled the script per route or used router events without the documented stateChange call.

scenarios.name: Trigger an NPS survey after a successful purchase and tag the recording so it's filterable
scenarios.rationale: Treatment used window.hj('trigger', 'post_purchase_nps') plus window.hj('tagRecording', [tag]) per the documented Survey API and tagRecording helpers; baseline embedded a third-party survey component and missed the API trigger mode + tagRecording pattern.
